info.title: AirVibe Manager API
info.description:
REST API for the AirVibe Manager platform.

Supports two deployment modes driven by the `NETWORK_SERVER` environment variable:
- **on-premise** (`NETWORK_SERVER=chirpstack`): bundles ChirpStack v4 LoRaWAN Network Server
- **cloud** (`NETWORK_SERVER=thingpark`): connects to Actility ThingPark

Authentication is controlled by the `API_KEYS_ENABLED` environment variable.
When enabled, all endpoints except `/health`, `/openapi.json`, and `/docs` require a
Bearer API key in the `Authorization` header.

Keys are created via `POST /api/keys`. The raw key is returned exactly once at creation time.

tags.name: Certificates
tags.description: X.509 certificate management for MQTT TLS

BearerAuth.description: API key in the format `airvibe_<64-hex-chars>`. Only enforced when `API_KEYS_ENABLED=true`. Create keys via `POST /api/keys`.

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

offset.name: offset
offset.description: Number of results to skip (for pagination)

from.name: from
from.description: Filter: include records created at or after this timestamp (ISO 8601)

to.name: to
to.description: Filter: include records created at or before this timestamp (ISO 8601)

metadata.description: Sample rate, axis mask, HW filter, etc.

segments.description: Present only on the detail endpoint — list of received segment indices

magnitudes.description: Amplitude values (units depend on spectrumType: g, mm/s, g²/Hz, g)

key.description: The raw API key — shown exactly once at creation. Store it securely.

configured.description: Whether the network server client has credentials configured

started.description: DevEUIs for which a session was started

Unauthorized.description: Missing or invalid Bearer API key

ServiceUnavailable.description: One or more backend dependencies are unavailable

get.description: Checks Postgres connectivity, MQTT connection, and active FUOTA sessions.

200.description: Paginated waveform list. Total count is in the `X-Total-Count` header.
Waveform detail including received segment indices
Decoded waveform samples as JSON attachment
CSV file with per-sample acceleration data

get.summary: Compute on-demand envelope spectrum with configurable bandpass filter

200.description: Per-axis envelope spectrum computed with the requested bandpass

get.summary: Get computed spectra for a waveform

200.description: Array of spectrum rows (acceleration, velocity, psd, envelope) per active axis
Paginated waveform list for the specified device
Paginated message list for the specified device

get.summary: Uplink packet type breakdown for a device

200.description: Array of uplink packet type counts with human-readable names

get.summary: Downlink command breakdown for a device

200.description: Array of downlink command counts with human-readable function names
Historical sessions from DB plus currently active in-memory sessions
Firmware stored — returns sessionId and block count

400.description: No file attached, empty file, or invalid filename

get.description: Returns whether the network server client has credentials configured and which type is active.

put.description: Updates live configuration for the running FUOTA manager. Changes take effect immediately for any in-progress or future verify/resend cycles — no restart required.

maxVerifyRetries.description: Maximum number of Verify Upgrade commands the session may send before failing. Shared budget for no-response retries and normal verify→resend→verify cycles.

post.description: Returns the raw key exactly once. Store it securely — it cannot be retrieved again.

201.description: Key created — raw key shown once

get.description: Returns metadata only — never the key hash or raw key.

post.description: Creates the CA and Mosquitto server certificate used for MQTT TLS.
Creates a client certificate + private key for an MQTT client to connect with mTLS.
Truncates waveforms, messages, and devices. Demo must be stopped first.

409.description: Demo is running — stop it first
